g.title: emitter
g.text: walshadow CH emitter — hold-open buffer, atomic-seal INSERT + DdlApplicator (dual CH TCP)

g.title: cluster_rows
g.text: row path — Emitter::route → buffer → atomic-seal INSERT (CH TCP #1)

g.title: cluster_ddl
g.text: DDL path — DdlApplicator (CH TCP #2, separate connection)

g.title: cols
g.text: held across xacts — NO open wire

g.title: apply
g.text: Added → CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS

g.title: legend
g.text: UInt32 — source xid; recovers xact boundary
DateTime64(6, 'UTC'); xl_xact_commit shifted from PG epoch
seal triggers — each flushes one complete INSERT
flush_timeout elapsed since first buffered row
surgical seal on affected key only
seal = open_wire → send_data(Some) → send_data(None) → EndOfStream → clear buffer (replay-safe; CH dedups by _lsn)
